criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: Presence and quality of AI-powered features such as personalized recommendations, voice assistants, and music discovery tools.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Music Library Size
criteria.description: Total number of songs and albums available in the app's library.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Quality and ease of use of the app's user interface and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert opinions

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Cost of premium subscription plans, if applicable.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability on different platforms such as iOS, Android, Web, etc.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Unique Features
criteria.description: Presence of unique features that set the app apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs
